price.disclaimer: Indicative starting price, varies by villa type, season & length of stay. Contact us to confirm.
price.disclaimer_id: Harga mulai bersifat indikatif, tergantung tipe villa, musim & lama menginap. Hubungi kami untuk konfirmasi.

faq.q: What time is check-in and check-out?
faq.a: Standard check-in is from the afternoon, and check-out is late morning. Exact times can be confirmed when you book.
This depends on the rate you book. Please ask us directly to confirm what's included for your dates.
Cancellation terms vary by booking platform and rate type. Please check your booking confirmation or ask us directly.
Please contact us directly to ask about airport transfer options.

faq_id.a: Check-in standar mulai siang hari, dan check-out di akhir pagi. Waktu pastinya bisa dikonfirmasi saat booking.
Tergantung tarif yang dipesan. Silakan tanya langsung ke kami untuk konfirmasi apa yang termasuk di tanggal kakak.
Ketentuan pembatalan berbeda tergantung platform booking dan jenis tarif. Cek konfirmasi booking kakak atau tanya langsung ke kami.

faq_id.q: Apakah ada layanan antar-jemput dari bandara?
faq_id.a: Silakan hubungi kami langsung untuk menanyakan opsi antar-jemput.

contact.address: Jl. Teratai No.168A, Celuk, Sukawati, Gianyar, Bali 80582
